loadout_items.notes: Charging the weapon in unsafe (0.5 to 3s) mode linearily increases the damage dealt by up to 150%. Explodes if a charge is held for more than 3s.
Teleporting every 6s is safe. Teleport distance is 10m in forward facing direction.
